item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
no way they were supposed to look like anything else
i've had one in the freezer for at least 4 days
i should probably watch this show
2nd snack
don't you hate pants?
not sure what that might entail
found it
finally it's here!
i guess
obviously
mmm hmm
"i am a generous god"
not very appetizing and i like shrimp
every year for me
i'm ok with the size of my peehole
this scene in the movie (basic instinct) was kind of legendary back in my day for... reasons
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Android 18 - Cosplay
item.description: Android 18! Every cosplay I've ever done usually turns out to be my favorite lol, but this one I really liked because it feels like the best adaptation of always trying to make my cosplays more "reality" based... I want a job at Netflix lol Also, I get asked this a lot - I always use color contacts and then increase or adjust color levels in post, it's so weird seeing blue eyes stare back at me :D
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: I feel alive
item.description: Have developed crush on co-worker as we hit very well with humor, music taste and many other topics including some heavy ones. Well, I have been a mess from my abusive ex and not so peaceful break-up from 5y ago. So, have some barriers to even think dating. I even have said here that I probably don't ever again go to date. (never say never or something something). I got my courage and asked if we could get know each other better, outside from work. for example local museum and waffle house (she had mentioned many times need for going those). And she refused, as she doesn't have time. On bright side. I haven't felt affinity to other person since ex and this is first time to ask a date for long time. On other note, I haven't dated around 10? year, so in case of positive respond, I would have not know how to proceed.
item.dc:creator: Chemicals404

item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: A friendly reminder
item.description: I'm really tired of church going people shoving their lifestyle in our faces all the time. Edit: Currently I cannot go anywhere where I live without seeing signs advertising for the myriad of churches. They even walk throughout the neighborhoods with prayer circles, delivering pamphlets. They stand outside grocery stores and pharmacies. At all times of the year now. In one square mile of me there are upward of 11 churches strewn throughout commercial and residential areas. So as my original part of this comment read I quite literally cannot go anywhere without seeing advertisements for their events and recruiting efforts, or other religious imagery. They buy up time for permits so other people and groups cannot. Also, due to their lobbying the availability for crucial health care that would help many people like myself has been swatted down because of ideology. TLDR: we have the rare thing to be able to practice religion and to also not practice religion here in the United States. The religious, specifically those of the abrahamic Christian / Catholic faiths are abusing that privilege. And are forcing their ideals on everybody else. I'm tired of that.
item.dc:creator: AnSquirrel

item.title: I work at a dog boarding and foster facility. This is Maverick.
item.description: I've seen puppies come and go but this wonderful little gentleman is passed over time and again. It's heartbreaking watching people pass him by just because he has a few issues, he sheds large amounts of fur ( I'm guessing because of stress) He has digestive issues. Oh and maybe because he's missing a leg? If I were able to, I'd take him home. At least we get to spend time together when I'm at work. ♥️ Edit: See that Maverick!? Most viral. You're to sexy for sub lol ty! ?! ?
item.dc:creator: DemonOnUrShoulder

item.title: Images of Note: I can STEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEAAAAAAAAAM
item.description:
STIM SLUG!
save the goblins, don't steal their shingles.
Can confirm, you can post an AI image of something that never happened in the 1960s and they would agree with you that it happened. Or maybe they're bots, I don't know
Also, look up where she got Robert Galbraith from.
The fact that the first thing AI people did was use it to make something we do as a basic human behavior harder to do for money rather than saving people's lives is proof that AI cannot be trusted in the hands of tech bros.
*hiss*
Bridget no!
I'm just here dragging Elliot. Also http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
Unfortunate timing there Clint.
That child will go far
Looks like Eric.
:o
I love cats.
Giant Isopod
They drink
HAMMER IN THE WINDSHIELD!
HELL YEAH
maybe that will fix me
I need to touch grass
Where are my rhesticles, Rhaggy?
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay also STREAM!: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
